task_summary: SMRV-02 (seeker-missile-fixes-round5): Repositioned the PH_SEEKER_ACTIVATION 'Activated seekers:' list anchor in FBattleDisplay::drawSeekerActivation() from getActionButtonRowBottom() to getActionPromptLineY(0), matching the drawPlaceMines/drawPlaceSeekers convention. Pass-2 (Verifier-driven remediation): Added behavioral anchor discrimination test testSeekerActivationAnchorIsAtActionPromptLineY in tests/gui/TacticalGuiLiveTest, plus FBattleDisplayTestPeer accessors seekerActivationRegionCount(), seekerActivationRegion(i), and checkSeekerActivationSelectionPublic().
final_test_outcomes: GuiTests: 54 run, 46 pass, 8 pre-existing source-contract failures (unrelated to SMRV-02). New test testSeekerActivationAnchorIsAtActionPromptLineY PASSED.
SSWTests: 178 run, 9 pre-existing FGameHeaderDependencyTest source-contract failures (unrelated to SMRV-02).
All SMRV-02 acceptance criteria verified behaviorally.
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: During PH_SEEKER_ACTIVATION, the 'Activated seekers:' list renders anchored to the top of the bottom panel (getActionPromptLineY(0)), not below the action-button row — VERIFIED BEHAVIORAL via testSeekerActivationAnchorIsAtActionPromptLineY.

AC-2: Each activation row's click region aligns with its new drawn position; clicking a row deactivates the intended seeker — VERIFIED BEHAVIORAL (click simulation reduces getActiveSeekersByMovingPlayerThisPhase().size()).
Source-contract (pass-1 merged): testSeekerActivationPanelListsInstructionAndOneRowPerInactiveSeeker asserts 'int y = getActionPromptLineY(0)' in src/tactical/FBattleDisplay.cpp.
implementation_context: Compare to: sf2 (main integration branch for round5)
all_modified_files: src/tactical/FBattleDisplay.cpp (Implementer: anchor change from getActionButtonRowBottom() to getActionPromptLineY(0))
tests/gui/TacticalGuiLiveTest.cpp (Tester: new behavioral test + FBattleDisplayTestPeer accessors)
doc/test-contracts.md (Tester: SMF-02 entry updated; SMRV-02 entry added; Documenter: SMRV-02 entry extended with behavioral test catalog)
include/tactical/FBattleDisplay.h (Documenter: drawSeekerActivation() docblock updated to reflect new anchor)
plan_context: Story: SMRV-02 — seeker activation panel anchor change from getActionButtonRowBottom() to getActionPromptLineY(0).
convention_guidance: AGENTS.md: Doxygen-style docblocks required in all header files; @author and @date Last Modified must be updated when functions change.
AGENTS.md: Behavioral tests are mandatory for all acceptance criteria; source-contract tests may supplement but not substitute.
doc/test-contracts.md: Tactical test source-contract catalog — new behavioral tests for tactical GUI must be cataloged here.
Module boundary: include/tactical/FBattleDisplay.h is a tactical header; no wx includes should be added.
assumptions: Comparison base is sf2 branch (standard round5 integration base).
Shared artifact directory is artifacts/seeker-missile-fixes-round5/SMRV-02 (provided in task summary).
